body: This PR ignores a few packages in the JET tests, and lowers the jet limit.
title: Ignore more packages in JET tests, lower inf failure limit

body:
The logic is as follows:

If `t_end < 1 day` take hourly means,
if `t_end < 1 year` take daily means,
If `t_end >= 1 year` take monthly means.
title: Use t_end to determine output frequency

body: This PR updates the compat entries and manifest files. I've also used CompatDevTools.jl to synchronize some compat entries, since they've gone out of sync.
title: Update dependencies
